query:
INSERT INTO orders (
  orderNumber, 
  customerName, 
  customerPhone, 
  orderType, 
  orderStatus, 
  paymentStatus, 
  paymentMethod,
  subtotal, 
  stateGst, 
  centralGst, 
  totalAmount, 
  outletId,
  staffNotes,
  createdAt
) VALUES (
  '00030',
  'Guest',
  '',
  'instore',
  'cancelled',
  'completed',
  'cash',
  2000,
  50,
  55,
  2105,
  1,
  'Duplicate order - System error during checkout (Jan 9)',
  NOW()
);
